how to be a great vibecoding pirate:
1. find one simple thing that works really well 2. then throw ...

how to be a great vibecoding pirate:
1. find one simple thing that works really well 2. then throw out what you already have https://t.co/WWa5M0lXCm

item.author: @danshipper

item.title: Read the lost thesis of Dennis Ritchie, creator of the C programming language & co-creator o...
item.description:
Read the lost thesis of Dennis Ritchie, creator of the C programming language &amp; co-creator of Unix: https://t.co/icflzD4aJl
Ritchie never got his PhD b/c he didn't want to pay Harvard the thesis binding fee.
(v/@IEEESpectrum) https://t.co/9cP5DZ8ZOA
--- @MIT_CSAIL | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 13
item.author: @MIT_CSAIL
